summary: Comprehensive testing of GST Invoice Management System with enhanced financial features. All 22 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI testing completed successfully for all new features including dual-type income (business/personal), bank-linked expenses with mandatory bank selection, mandatory opening balance for bank accounts, consolidated and bank-wise ledger views, and bank transfers.

issues: Some legacy expenses show '-' for PAID FROM and MODE columns - these are older entries without bank_account_id

backend_api_tests: Health check endpoint
Login with valid credentials
Login rejection with invalid credentials
GET /api/bank-accounts - List bank accounts
POST /api/bank-accounts - Create bank account with mandatory opening balance
POST /api/bank-accounts - Reject creation without opening balance (422)
PUT /api/bank-accounts/{id} - Update bank account (opening balance locked)
GET /api/income - List all income entries
GET /api/income?income_type=invoice - Filter invoice income
GET /api/income?income_type=personal - Filter personal income
POST /api/income - Create personal income with source
POST /api/income - Reject personal income without source (400)
POST /api/income - Reject income without bank account (400)
GET /api/expenses - List expenses
POST /api/expenses - Create expense with mandatory bank account
POST /api/expenses - Reject expense without bank account (400)
GET /api/bank-transfers - List bank transfers
POST /api/bank-transfers - Create bank transfer
POST /api/bank-transfers - Reject transfer to same account (400)
GET /api/ledger - Consolidated ledger with income breakdown
GET /api/ledger/bank/{id} - Bank-wise ledger with running balance
GET /api/dashboard/stats - Dashboard with business/personal income breakdown
frontend_ui_tests: Dashboard displays Opening Balance, Income Received, Total Expenses, Current Balance
Dashboard shows Business Income vs Personal Income breakdown
Income page shows Total Income, Business Income, Personal Income cards
Income dialog has Business/Personal type selector
Income dialog shows Invoice selector for Business type
Income dialog shows Income Source dropdown for Personal type
Income dialog has mandatory Bank Account selector (Credited To)
Expenses page shows Total Expenses with category breakdown
Expenses dialog has mandatory Bank Account selector (Paid From)
Ledger page has Consolidated and Bank-wise view toggle
Consolidated ledger shows Opening + Income - Expenses = Closing calculation
Consolidated ledger shows Business Income and Personal Income breakdown
Bank-wise ledger shows individual bank transactions with running balance
Settings page has Bank Accounts section with Total Balance
Add Bank Account dialog has mandatory Opening Balance fields
Opening balance marked as 'will be locked after account creation'
Transfer button available for inter-bank transfers

critical_code_review_comments: All new API endpoints properly implemented with authentication
Dual income types (invoice/personal) correctly implemented with proper validation
Bank account mandatory for all income and expenses - enforced at API level
Opening balance locked after bank account creation - cannot be modified via regular update
Bank-wise ledger correctly calculates running balance for each transaction
Consolidated ledger correctly separates business and personal income
Bank transfers validate source/destination and check sufficient balance
updated_files: /app/tests/test_enhanced_financial_features.py - Created comprehensive test suite for enhanced financial features (22 tests)
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for bank accounts, income, expenses, and transfers during API testing. Cleanup performed at end of test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All enhanced financial features are working correctly. Features tested: Dual-type income (invoice-linked vs personal with source selection), mandatory bank account selection for income and expenses, mandatory opening balance when creating bank accounts (locked after creation), consolidated ledger view with business/personal income breakdown, bank-wise ledger view with running balance, bank transfers between accounts. The application has 1 bank account (TEST_Updated Bank) with ₹5,000 balance, 4 business income entries totaling ₹13,500, and 2 marketing expenses totaling ₹1,500.
